subject: [PATCH v2 104/110] fsnotify: replace PRIino with %llu/%llx format strings

reviews.author: Jeff Layton (author)
reviews.summary: The author is re-posting the original patch description, which suggests they are not addressing any specific feedback or concern from the reviewer.

reviews.author: Jan Kara
reviews.summary: Reviewer approved the patch and added a Reviewed-by tag, indicating they have reviewed it.
reviews.raw_body:
Looks good. Feel free to add:

Reviewed-by: Jan Kara <jack@suse.cz>

								Honza

2026-03-02.patch_summary: This patch updates the fsnotify code to use explicit format strings for printing inode numbers instead of relying on a deprecated macro. The changes affect two files, replacing PRIino with %llu/%llx in seq_printf statements.
